name: @jablonowski/components
description: Angular component library built on Angular Material, themed with design system tokens.

scripts.publish:lib: npm run build && cd dist && npm publish --access public
scripts.release: npm run build && cd dist && npm version patch && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:minor: npm run build && cd dist && npm version minor && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:major: npm run build && cd dist && npm version major && npm publish --access public

author: Mateusz
